design_philosophy.core: Clean, modern, trustworthy marketplace focused on community connection.
design_philosophy.emotion: Warmth, calm, trust, and grounded physical connection.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: No pure black #000000 or pure gray #808080. Always tint grays with warmth.
No standard Inter font for headings.

background.description: Warm off-white background to feel physical and grounded.

text.description: Deep stone/charcoal text for high contrast (WCAG AA). Never pure black.

brand.description: Primary is Forest Green for trust, local growth. Secondary is Terracotta/Clay for warmth and action.

fonts.heading: 'Outfit', sans-serif
fonts.description: Outfit for approachable, modern headings. Work Sans for highly readable, utilitarian body text.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-[#1C1917]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#1C1917]
hierarchy.label: text-xs tracking-[0.15em] uppercase font-semibold text-[#57534E]

grid_patterns.public_marketplace: Bento-style or overlapping asymmetry for marketing pages. Use gap-8 to gap-12.
grid_patterns.dashboards: Control Room Grid. Dense, organized, gap-6. Direct grid children only. Subgrid for alignment.

surfaces_and_effects.marketing_cards: Flat background with 1px subtle border (#E7E5E4). No heavy drop shadows. Hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and soft ambient shadow.
surfaces_and_effects.glassmorphism: Only for sticky headers: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200.
surfaces_and_effects.borders: Soft radiuses. rounded-xl for main cards, rounded-full for pills/buttons.

components.public_pages: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for hero, catalogs, storefronts. Avoid rigid Shadcn wrappers for creative sections.
components.dashboards_and_forms: Use Shadcn UI (Forms, Tables, Dialogs, Selects) but customize them with the 'Organic & Earthy' color palette. Remove the Vercel-look.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#2D6A4F] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#1B4332] transition-colors. Secondary: bg-[#F3F4F6] text-[#1C1917] hover:bg-[#E7E5E4].
components.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (e.g. data-testid="login-submit-btn").

hero_market.description: Vibrant local market scene. Use in public homepage hero section with a black/30 overlay if text is on top.

service_plumber.description: Placeholder for service catalog (e.g., local plumbing or repairs).

product_crafts.description: Placeholder for local physical products (handmade crafts/baskets).

icons.rationale: Default clean UI matching the earthy and modern vibe.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the 'Organic & Earthy' color palette. DO NOT default to black and white with blue buttons.
For the public marketplace, build bespoke HTML/Tailwind layouts. Use grid bento concepts, wide spacing, and offset symmetry.
For Dashboards (Seller/Admin), use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize the colors to match our palette.
Every button, link, and form input MUST have a role-based data-testid attribute.
Ensure hover states explicitly declare text colors to prevent contrast issues.
Utilize the media_urls provided as absolute requirements for images. Do not use generic placeholders.
